Pablo
Winant
Computational Economist

Economic models reveal structure that words can't. I solve them, build tools that solve them faster, and teach with the same tools I use in research.

Research Teach Build

Understanding economic dynamics through models and computation.

Current Questions
How can heterogeneous-agent models be solved efficiently at scale? →
How should computational economics be taught to students who aren't programmers? →
How can open-source software change the practice of quantitative economics? →

Numerical methods for heterogeneous-agent models
Algorithms, perturbation methods and solvers for high-dimensional models.
